name: mobili
description: Script unique : compile + tests backend + build (frontend voyageur + mobili-business) + tests front

scripts.build:front:staging: cd frontend && npx ng build --configuration staging
scripts.build:front:business:prod: cd frontend && npx ng build mobili-business --configuration=production
scripts.verify:frontend:business: cd frontend && npx ng build mobili-business --configuration=development
